# AI Personal Assistant (AIPA) — Documentation Index

> AI Personal Assistant (AIPA) is a private, all-in-one productivity app that bundles 40+ tools — tasks, notes, planners, habits, AI chat and writing, finance and health trackers, flashcards, file utilities, and more — into a single workspace for web, Android, and iOS. AI features run on a user-supplied Google Gemini API key (bring-your-own-key), so there is no developer-funded paid LLM. Live app: https://aipa.aoneahsan.com. Author: Ahsan Mahmood / Zaions (https://aoneahsan.com).

## About

AIPA replaces a drawer full of single-purpose apps with one launcher. It is built with React, TypeScript, and Capacitor (web + Android + iOS) and stores data under the signed-in user's own Firebase free-tier account; device-only settings use on-device storage. AI tools (AI Brain, chat, writing assistant, translation, summarization, image/SVG generation) call Google Gemini using an API key the user provides. This `llms.txt` follows the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) spec.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/intro): What AIPA is, who it's for, the platforms it runs on, and the 40-tools-in-one value.
- [Installation](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/installation): Use the web app or install from Google Play.
- [Quick Start](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/quick-start): Sign in with Google and open your first tool.
- [Account & Sync](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/account-and-sync): How accounts, cross-device sync, and offline behavior work.

## AI Setup

- [Bring Your Own Key (Gemini)](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/ai/bring-your-own-key): Where to get a free Google Gemini API key, where to paste it in-app, and which features need it vs. which run client-side for free.

## Features (by category)

- [Productivity](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/productivity): Tasks, notes, rich-text notes, diary, goals, projects, daily/weekly planners, time tracker, reminders, smart calendar, bookmarks, mind map, Pomodoro timer, habit tracker.
- [AI & Content](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/ai-and-content): AI Brain, AI chat, voice notes, translator, speech (TTS/STT), writing assistant, document scanner (OCR), AI image generator, markdown editor.
- [Finance & Health](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/finance-and-health): Expense tracker and budget planner, savings tracker, and a health hub (meditation, mood, sleep, water, exercise).
- [Learning & Collaboration](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/learning-and-collaboration): Flashcards, quiz creator, vocabulary builder, wiki, code snippets, polls, whiteboard, speed reading.
- [Utilities](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/utilities): PDF annotator, cloud file manager, file tools, QR code studio, currency converter, event countdown, time-zone converter, gratitude journal.

## How-to Guides

- [Track your habits](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/track-your-habits): Build a habit and keep a streak.
- [Plan your day](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/plan-your-day): Use the daily planner and review.
- [Use the Pomodoro timer](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/use-the-pomodoro-timer): Focus in work/break cycles.
- [Manage your budget](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/manage-your-budget): Track expenses and plan a budget.

## Privacy & About

- [Privacy & Data](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/privacy-and-data): What is stored, where, local-only data, file uploads, and account deletion.
- [About the Author](https://ai-personal-assistant-docs.aoneahsan.com/about-the-author): Ahsan Mahmood's developer profile, links, and contact.
- Live app: https://aipa.aoneahsan.com
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.aoneahsan.aipa
